description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: communications between the Department of the Interior and several Indian tribes which, in expressing their views to the Department on certain matters of administrative decisionmaking.

_provenance.case_name: Department of the Interior v. Klamath Water Users Protective Ass'n, 532 U.S. 1 (2001)
_provenance.record_description_quote: communications between the Department of the Interior and several Indian tribes which, in expressing their views to the Department on certain matters of administrative decisionmaking
_provenance.outcome_quote: the Court ruled that the threshold of Exemption 5 did not encompass
_provenance.note: Consultant-corollary limit: parties with their own interests are not 'consultants' for (b)(5) purposes.
